title: Operational Risk Management Time Critical Risk Management
source_filename: Operational Risk Management Time Critical Risk Management.docx

qas.q: What is the definition of Time Critical Risk Management
qas.a: Effective use of all available resources by individuals, crews and teams to safely and effectively accomplish the mission or task using risk management concepts when time and resources are limited

qas.q: What is the outcome from the "DO and DEBRIEF" step of risk management
What are the THREE resources used during the "BALANCE" step of risk management?
qas.a: Balance resources, balance resources vs hazards, individual vs team effort

qas.q: What is the role of communication in risk management?
Select the THREE stages of situational awareness within risk management from the answers provided
qas.a: Perception of the elements in their environment within a volume of time and space, comprehension of their meaning, projection of their status in the near future

qas.q: What is the definition of ORM?
qas.a: The process of dealing with risk associated within military operations, which includes risk assessment, risk decision making and implementation of effective risk controls

qas.q: What are the THREE different levels of risk
What are the THREE criteria used in the "COMMUNICATION" step of risk management
qas.a: Communicate your hazards and intentions, communicate to the right people, ya the right communication style

qas.q: What are the THREE factors in the "ASSESS" step of risk assessment
qas.a: Task loading, human factors, additive conditions
